name: Plex
args: -hide_banner -loglevel warning -nostdin -analyzeduration 5000000 -probesize 5000000 -err_detect ignore_err -i {input} -map 0:v -map 0:a:0 -max_muxing_queue_size 4096 -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 192k -ac 2 -c:s copy -f mpegts -fflags +genpts+discardcorrupt -copyts pipe:1
